title: unbound bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.16.2-21]
- Fix RebirthDay Attack (CVE-2025-5994)
- Resolves: RHEL-104129

[1.16.2-20]
- Fix verification of unbound-control key files
- Resolves: RHEL-65396
full_text:
[1.16.2-21]
- Fix RebirthDay Attack (CVE-2025-5994)
- Resolves: RHEL-104129

[1.16.2-20]
- Fix verification of unbound-control key files
- Resolves: RHEL-65396
